name: New Components Showcase
description: Comprehensive showcase combining all new components: AuroraBackground, WaveBackground, ParticleSystem, MetaBalls, GlitchEffect, ThreeScene, SVGDrawing, and TypewriterEffect in one impressive 9-second video.

props.text:
The future is here.
Frame-perfect animations.
Built for video.

AuroraBackground.code: function AuroraBackground(props) { var w = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.width : 1920; var h = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.height : 1080; var frame = props.frame || 0; var fps = props.fps || 30; var t = frame / fps; var colors = props.colors || ['#667eea', '#764ba2', '#f093fb', '#4facfe']; var speed = props.speed || 0.8; var blur = props.blur || 40; var opacity = props.opacity || 0.6; var blobs = []; for (var i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) { var phase = i * Math.PI * 2 / colors.length; var x = 50 + Math.sin(t * speed * 0.5 + phase) * 30; var y = 30 + Math.cos(t * speed * 0.3 + phase * 1.5) * 25; var scale = 1 + Math.sin(t * speed * 0.2 + i) * 0.3; blobs.push(React.createElement('div', { key: i, style: { position: 'absolute', left: x + '%', top: y + '%', width: (300 * scale) + 'px', height: (200 * scale) + 'px', borderRadius: '50%', background: colors[i], filter: 'blur(' + blur + 'px)', opacity: opacity, transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)', transition: 'none' } })); } return React.createElement('div', { style: { position: 'relative', width: '100%', height: '100%', overflow: 'hidden', background: '#0a0a1f' } }, blobs); }

ParticleSystem.code: function ParticleSystem(props) { var count = props.count || 60; var w = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.width : (props.width || 1920); var h = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.height : (props.height || 1080); var frame = props.frame || 0; var fps = props.fps || 30; var t = frame / fps; var seed = props.seed || 0; var dir = props.direction || 'radial'; var wrap = props.wrap || false; var fadeOut = props.fadeOut !== undefined ? props.fadeOut : false; var fadeIn = props.fadeIn !== undefined ? props.fadeIn : false; var lifetime = props.lifetime || 999; var sizeRange = Array.isArray(props.size) ? props.size : [props.size || 4, props.size || 4]; var speedRange = Array.isArray(props.speed) ? props.speed : [props.speed || 1, props.speed || 1]; var opacityRange = Array.isArray(props.opacity) ? props.opacity : [props.opacity || 1, props.opacity || 1]; var color = props.color || '#ffffff'; var pType = props.type || 'circle'; function rng(i) { var x = Math.sin(i * 9301 + seed * 49297 + 233280) * 0.5 + 0.5; return x - Math.floor(x); } var els = []; for (var i = 0; i < count; i++) { var r1 = rng(i * 7 + 1); var r2 = rng(i * 13 + 2); var r3 = rng(i * 19 + 3); var r4 = rng(i * 31 + 4); var r5 = rng(i * 43 + 5); var sz = sizeRange[0] + r1 * (sizeRange[1] - sizeRange[0]); var spd = speedRange[0] + r2 * (speedRange[1] - speedRange[0]); var op = opacityRange[0] + r3 * (opacityRange[1] - opacityRange[0]); var x, y; if (dir === 'radial') { var angle = r4 * Math.PI * 2; var dist = t * spd * 60; x = w / 2 + Math.cos(angle) * dist; y = h / 2 + Math.sin(angle) * dist; } else if (dir === 'down') { x = r4 * w; y = ((r5 * h + t * spd * 60) % (h + 20)) - 10; if (!wrap && y < 0) continue; } else { x = r4 * w + Math.sin(t * spd + i) * 30; y = r5 * h + Math.cos(t * spd + i * 0.7) * 30; } if (wrap) { x = ((x % w) + w) % w; y = ((y % h) + h) % h; } var age = frame; if (fadeOut && age > lifetime * 0.5) op *= Math.max(0, 1 - (age - lifetime * 0.5) / (lifetime * 0.5)); if (fadeIn && age < 30) op *= age / 30; if (op <= 0) continue; var c = Array.isArray(color) ? color[i % color.length] : color; if (pType === 'star') { var pts = ''; for (var j = 0; j < 10; j++) { var a = j * Math.PI / 5 - Math.PI / 2; var rad = j % 2 === 0 ? sz : sz * 0.4; pts += (x + Math.cos(a) * rad) + ',' + (y + Math.sin(a) * rad) + ' '; } els.push(React.createElement('polygon', { key: i, points: pts.trim(), fill: c, opacity: op })); } else if (pType === 'square') { els.push(React.createElement('rect', { key: i, x: x - sz/2, y: y - sz/2, width: sz, height: sz, fill: c, opacity: op })); } else { els.push(React.createElement('circle', { key: i, cx: x, cy: y, r: sz, fill: c, opacity: op })); } } if (props.connections) { var maxDist = props.connectionDistance || 120; var connColor = props.connectionColor || color; var connOp = props.connectionOpacity || 0.3; for (var a = 0; a < Math.min(count, 40); a++) { var r4a = rng(a * 31 + 4); var r5a = rng(a * 43 + 5); var spda = speedRange[0] + rng(a * 13 + 2) * (speedRange[1] - speedRange[0]); var xa = r4a * w + Math.sin(t * spda + a) * 30; var ya = r5a * h + Math.cos(t * spda + a * 0.7) * 30; for (var b = a + 1; b < Math.min(count, 40); b++) { var r4b = rng(b * 31 + 4); var r5b = rng(b * 43 + 5); var spdb = speedRange[0] + rng(b * 13 + 2) * (speedRange[1] - speedRange[0]); var xb = r4b * w + Math.sin(t * spdb + b) * 30; var yb = r5b * h + Math.cos(t * spdb + b * 0.7) * 30; var dx = xa - xb; var dy = ya - yb; var d = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy); if (d < maxDist) { els.push(React.createElement('line', { key: 'c' + a + '-' + b, x1: xa, y1: ya, x2: xb, y2: yb, stroke: typeof connColor === 'string' ? connColor : '#fff', strokeWidth: props.connectionWidth || 1, opacity: connOp * (1 - d / maxDist) })); } } } } return React.createElement('svg', { width: w, height: h, style: { position: 'absolute', top: 0, left: 0 } }, els); }

WaveBackground.code: function WaveBackground(props) { var w = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.width : 1920; var h = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.height : 1080; var frame = props.frame || 0; var fps = props.fps || 30; var t = frame / fps; var colors = props.colors || ['#0ea5e9', '#06b6d4', '#14b8a6']; var speed = props.speed || 0.3; var waveCount = Math.min(props.waveCount || 3, colors.length); var amp = props.amplitude || 60; var freq = props.frequency || 0.02; var dir = props.direction || 'bottom'; var opacity = props.opacity !== undefined ? props.opacity : 1; var paths = []; for (var i = 0; i < waveCount; i++) { var baseY = dir === 'both' ? (i % 2 === 0 ? h * 0.7 + i * 40 : h * 0.2 - i * 20) : h * 0.55 + i * 80; var d = 'M0,' + baseY; for (var x = 0; x <= w; x += 20) { var y = baseY + Math.sin(x * freq + t * speed * (2 + i * 0.5) + i * 2) * amp * (1 - i * 0.15); y += Math.sin(x * freq * 0.5 + t * speed * 1.5 + i * 3) * amp * 0.3; d += ' L' + x + ',' + y; } if (dir === 'both' && i % 2 !== 0) { d += ' L' + w + ',0 L0,0 Z'; } else { d += ' L' + w + ',' + h + ' L0,' + h + ' Z'; } paths.push(React.createElement('path', { key: i, d: d, fill: colors[i % colors.length], opacity: 0.6 - i * 0.1 })); } return React.createElement('svg', { width: w, height: h, style: { position: 'absolute', top: 0, left: 0, opacity: opacity } }, paths); }

TypewriterEffect.code: function TypewriterEffect(props) { var frame = props.frame || 0; var fps = props.fps || 30; var text = props.text || ''; var speed = props.speed || 15; var startDelay = props.startDelay || 0; var fontSize = props.fontSize || 48; var color = props.color || '#ffffff'; var fontFamily = props.fontFamily || 'monospace'; var lineHeight = props.lineHeight || 1.6; var cursor = props.cursor !== false; var cursorColor = props.cursorColor || color; var elapsed = Math.max(0, frame - startDelay); var charsToShow = Math.min(text.length, Math.floor(elapsed / fps * speed * fps / 30)); var shown = text.substring(0, charsToShow); var cursorEl = cursor && frame % 30 < 20 ? React.createElement('span', { style: { color: cursorColor, fontWeight: 'normal' } }, '|') : null; return React.createElement('div', { style: { fontSize: fontSize + 'px', color: color, fontFamily: fontFamily, lineHeight: lineHeight, whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' } }, shown, cursorEl); }

MetaBalls.code: function MetaBalls(props) { var w = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.width : 1920; var h = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.height : 1080; var frame = props.frame || 0; var fps = props.fps || 30; var t = frame / fps; var count = props.count || 6; var colors = props.colors || ['#ff0080', '#00ffff', '#ffff00']; var size = props.size || 120; var speed = props.speed || 1.2; var blur = props.blur || 50; var bg = props.backgroundColor || '#000000'; var blobs = []; for (var i = 0; i < count; i++) { var angle = t * speed * (0.5 + i * 0.2) + i * Math.PI * 2 / count; var rx = 200 + i * 50; var ry = 150 + i * 30; var cx = w / 2 + Math.cos(angle) * rx; var cy = h / 2 + Math.sin(angle * 0.7) * ry; var s = size + Math.sin(t * 2 + i) * 20; blobs.push(React.createElement('div', { key: i, style: { position: 'absolute', left: cx + 'px', top: cy + 'px', width: s * 2 + 'px', height: s * 2 + 'px', borderRadius: '50%', background: colors[i % colors.length], filter: 'blur(' + blur + 'px)', transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)', opacity: 0.8 } })); } return React.createElement('div', { style: { position: 'relative', width: '100%', height: '100%', overflow: 'hidden', background: bg } }, blobs); }

GlitchEffect.code: function GlitchEffect(props) { var w = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.width : 1920; var h = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.height : 1080; var frame = props.frame || 0; var intensity = props.intensity || 0.7; var freq = props.frequency || 0.15; var isGlitching = Math.sin(frame * freq * Math.PI) > (1 - intensity); var offset = isGlitching ? Math.sin(frame * 7.3) * 15 * intensity : 0; var slices = []; if (isGlitching) { for (var i = 0; i < 5; i++) { var y = Math.random() * h; var sh = 5 + Math.random() * 30; slices.push(React.createElement('div', { key: i, style: { position: 'absolute', left: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 40 * intensity + 'px', top: y + 'px', width: '100%', height: sh + 'px', background: ['rgba(255,0,0,0.15)', 'rgba(0,255,0,0.15)', 'rgba(0,0,255,0.15)'][i % 3], mixBlendMode: 'screen' } })); } } return React.createElement('div', { style: { position: 'relative', width: '100%', height: '100%', overflow: 'hidden', transform: 'translateX(' + offset + 'px)' } }, slices); }

ThreeScene.code: function ThreeScene(props) { var w = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.width : 800; var h = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.height : 600; var frame = props.frame || 0; var color = props.color || '#7c3aed'; var scale = props.scale || 2.5; var rot = props.rotation || {}; var rx = (rot.x || 0) * frame * 0.02; var ry = (rot.y || 0) * frame * 0.02; return React.createElement('div', { style: { width: '100%', height: '100%', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', perspective: '600px' } }, React.createElement('div', { style: { width: (80 * scale) + 'px', height: (80 * scale) + 'px', background: color, transform: 'rotateX(' + rx + 'rad) rotateY(' + ry + 'rad)', boxShadow: '0 0 40px ' + color } })); }

SVGDrawing.code: function SVGDrawing(props) { var frame = props.frame || 0; var fps = props.fps || 30; var t = frame / fps; var duration = props.duration || 1.5; var progress = Math.min(1, t / duration); var strokeColor = props.strokeColor || '#00ffff'; var strokeWidth = props.strokeWidth || 4; var w = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.width : 600; var h = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.height : 400; var dashLen = 800; var dashOffset = dashLen * (1 - progress); var paths = [ React.createElement('path', { key: 0, d: 'M100,30 L130,90 L100,150 L70,90 Z', fill: 'none', stroke: strokeColor, strokeWidth: strokeWidth, strokeDasharray: dashLen, strokeDashoffset: dashOffset }), React.createElement('circle', { key: 1, cx: 100, cy: 100, r: 60, fill: 'none', stroke: strokeColor, strokeWidth: strokeWidth, strokeDasharray: dashLen, strokeDashoffset: dashOffset * 0.8 }), React.createElement('path', { key: 2, d: 'M40,100 L160,100 M100,40 L100,160', fill: 'none', stroke: strokeColor, strokeWidth: strokeWidth, strokeDasharray: dashLen, strokeDashoffset: dashOffset * 0.6 }) ]; return React.createElement('svg', { viewBox: '0 0 200 200', width: w, height: h }, paths); }
